name: Go Board Viewer

releases.author: j2masamitu
releases.description:
## 🎉 Major Release: SGF Editor Mode

### New Features

#### SGF Editor Mode
- **View/Edit Mode Selection**: Choose mode by code block language tag
  - ```sgf` - View-only mode with full playback controls
  - ```sgf-edit` - Edit mode with interactive board manipulation
- **Interactive Editing**: Click on the board to make changes
  - Add black or white stones
  - Remove existing stones
  - Add custom text labels to intersections
- **Comment Editor**: Edit and save comments for any position
- **Game Info Editor**: Edit player names, ranks, and game title
- **Move Deletion**: Delete moves from current position onwards
- **SGF Output Display**: View and copy edited SGF text in real-time
- **Auto-play Mode**: Automatic move playback with play/pause controls

#### Enhanced Viewer
- **Move Parameter Support**: Start at specific move number
  - Syntax: `![[game.sgf|move=10]]`
  - Works with file embeds and direct file opening

### Improvements
- Improved UI layout with better organization of controls
- Game info display updates dynamically when edited
- All UI text updated to sentence case for consistency

### Technical
- Added ESLint configuration for code quality
- Implemented proper CSS class-based element visibility
- Enhanced SGF tree manipulation and regeneration
- Improved state management for edit modes

### Documentation
- Comprehensive documentation updates for all new features
- Usage examples for both view and edit modes
- English and Japanese documentation

---

## Installation

### Manual Installation
1. Download `goboard-viewer.zip` from the assets below
2. Extract to `.obsidian/plugins/goboard-viewer/`
3. Enable the plugin in Obsidian Settings → Community Plugins

### Usage
See the [README](https://github.com/j2masamitu/obsidian-goboard-viewer) for detailed usage instructions.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/j2masamitu/obsidian-goboard-viewer/compare/1.2.4...2.0.0
releases.name: v2.0.0 - SGF Editor Features

releases.author: j2masamitu
releases.description:
## New Features ✨

### Comprehensive Color Customization
Now you can fully customize the appearance of your Go boards with **5 color settings**:

🎨 **Board background color** - Choose from traditional wood tones or any color you prefer  
📏 **Board line color** - Customize grid lines and star points  
🔢 **Coordinate color** - Set the color for board coordinates (A-T, 1-19)  
⭕ **Marker color** - Customize SGF markers (circles, triangles, squares, labels)  
🔤 **Variation label color** - Set color for variation labels (A, B, C, etc.)

### Easy to Use
- **Color pickers** for all settings - just click and choose your color
- **Reset to defaults** button - restore all colors with one click
- **Real-time updates** - colors apply instantly to all boards

### Default Colors
- Board: `#DCB35C` (traditional wood grain)
- Lines: `#000000` (black)  
- Coordinates: `#333333` (dark gray)
- Markers: `#FF0000` (red)
- Variations: `#2196F3` (blue)

## How to Use

1. Open **Obsidian Settings**
2. Go to **Go Board Viewer** settings
3. Use color pickers to customize each element
4. Click **Reset to defaults** to restore original colors

## Bug Fixes 🐛

- Fixed board grid lines not updating when line color is changed

## Thanks 🙏

Special thanks to u/bobsollish for suggesting the color customization feature!

---

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
releases.name: v1.2.1 - Comprehensive Color Customization

releases.author: j2masamitu
releases.description:
## Features
- ✨ Added customizable board background color
- ✨ Added customizable grid line color
- 🎨 Settings tab with color pickers for easy customization
- ⚡ Real-time color updates using CSS variables

## Technical Details
- CSS variables (--goboard-bg-color and --goboard-line-color) for dynamic theming
- Default board color: #DCB35C (traditional wood grain)
- Default line color: #000000 (black)

## How to Use
1. Open Obsidian Settings
2. Go to "Go Board Viewer" settings
3. Use color pickers to customize board background and line colors
4. Colors update instantly on all boards

releases.name: Version 1.1.8

releases.author: j2masamitu
releases.description:
## Fixed

- Fixed unwanted small marker text appearing on empty intersections
- Hidden default text content from shudan library for markers, showing only custom marker symbols
- Improved marker display by hiding all child elements and showing only ::before pseudo-element content

## Changed

- Increased coordinate font size from 9px to 11px for better readability
- Changed coordinate color to #333 for improved visibility
releases.name: Version 1.1.7

releases.author: j2masamitu
releases.description:
## Fixed

- Reverted overly aggressive text-hiding CSS from version 1.1.5 that was preventing SGF markers and labels from displaying
- Fixed coordinate number overlapping issue for 2-digit numbers by adding proper coordinate styling
- SGF markers (circles, squares, triangles, labels, etc.) now display correctly again
- Improved coordinate readability with better color (#333)

## Changes

- Removed excessive text-hiding CSS rules that were affecting markers
- Added min-width to vertical coordinates to accommodate 2-digit numbers
- Overrode shudan library's inline height/width restrictions for coordinates

releases.author: j2masamitu
releases.description:
## Changes

Fixed all code quality issues identified by Obsidian plugin review bot:

### Security & Best Practices
- ✅ Replaced all `innerHTML`, `outerHTML`, and `insertAdjacentHTML` with safe DOM API methods
- ✅ Changed all `console.log` to `console.debug` (only warn/error/debug allowed)

### Code Quality
- ✅ Fixed async/await issues (removed unnecessary async, proper Promise handling)
- ✅ Replaced all `any` types with proper TypeScript types
- ✅ Removed unused variables
- ✅ Fixed expression statements

All required changes have been addressed. The plugin now meets Obsidian's code quality standards for Community Plugins submission.

No functional changes from version 1.1.1.
releases.name: 1.1.2 - Code Quality Fixes for Plugin Review

releases.name: 1.1.1 - Update Description

releases.author: j2masamitu
releases.description:
# Release Notes - Version 1.1.0

## ⚠️ Breaking Change: Plugin ID Update

This release changes the plugin ID to comply with Obsidian's Community Plugin guidelines.

**Plugin ID changed from:** `obsidian-goboard-viewer` → `goboard-viewer`

### Why this change?

Obsidian's official plugin guidelines state: **"The id can't contain obsidian."**

This change is required for submission to the Obsidian Community Plugins directory.

---

## 📦 Migration Instructions for Existing Users

If you're upgrading from version 1.0.0, please follow these steps:

### Option 1: Manual Reinstallation (Recommended)

1. **Disable the old plugin** in Obsidian Settings → Community Plugins
2. **Delete the old plugin folder:**
   - `.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-goboard-viewer/`
3. **Download version 1.1.0** from the [Releases page](https://github.com/j2masamitu/obsidian-goboard-viewer/releases)
4. **Extract to the new folder:**
   - `.obsidian/plugins/goboard-viewer/`
5. **Enable the plugin** in Obsidian Settings → Community Plugins

### Option 2: Using BRAT

If you installed via BRAT:
1. Update the plugin through BRAT
2. The new folder will be created automatically

### For Mobile Users with Sync Plugins

If you use a sync plugin like "Remotely Save":
1. Enable "Sync Config Dir" temporarily
2. Sync to mobile devices
3. Verify the new plugin folder appears
4. You can disable "Sync Config Dir" after installation

---

## 📝 Changes in This Release

### Changed
- **Plugin ID**: Changed from `obsidian-goboard-viewer` to `goboard-viewer`
- **Installation path**: Now `.obsidian/plugins/goboard-viewer/`
- Updated all documentation to reflect the new plugin ID

### Documentation Updates
- ✅ README.md - Updated installation paths
- ✅ README_ja.md - Updated installation paths (Japanese)
- ✅ setup.sh - Updated setup script
- ✅ CONTRIBUTING.md - Updated development instructions

---

## ✨ No Functional Changes

This release contains **no changes to plugin functionality**. All features work exactly the same:

- ✅ SGF file embedding
- ✅ SGF code blocks
- ✅ Mobile & desktop support
- ✅ Playback controls
- ✅ Variation support
- ✅ Markers (TR, SQ, CR, MA, LB)
- ✅ Game information display

---

## 🎯 Next Steps

This update prepares the plugin for:
- **Submission to Obsidian Community Plugins** - Users will be able to install directly from Obsidian
- **Better discoverability** - Listed in the official plugin directory
- **Automatic updates** - Through Obsidian's built-in plugin manager

---

## 📚 Full Documentation

- [English README](https://github.com/j2masamitu/obsidian-goboard-viewer/blob/main/README.md)
- [日本語 README](https://github.com/j2masamitu/obsidian-goboard-viewer/blob/main/README_ja.md)

---

## 🙏 Thank You

Thank you for using Go Board Viewer! If you encounter any issues with the migration, please [open an issue](https://github.com/j2masamitu/obsidian-goboard-viewer/issues).
releases.name: 1.1.0 - Plugin ID Update (Breaking Change)

releases.author: j2masamitu
releases.description:
## 🎉 Initial Release

  An Obsidian plugin to display SGF (Smart Game Format) files as interactive
   Go boards.

  ### ✨ Features

  #### Core Features
  - 📱 **Mobile & Desktop Support**: Works on iOS, Android, Windows, Mac,
  and Linux
  - 📄 **SGF File Embedding**: Display `.sgf` files using `![[game.sgf]]`
  syntax
  - 💻 **Code Block Support**: Render SGF text in ` ```sgf ` code blocks
  - 📂 **Direct File Opening**: Open `.sgf` files directly in Obsidian
  - ℹ️ **Game Information**: Display player names, ranks, event, date, komi,
   handicap, and result

  #### Playback & Navigation
  - ⏮️ **Playback Controls**: First/Previous/Next/Last move buttons
  - 💬 **Move Comments**: Display comments for each move
  - 🌳 **Variation Support**: Navigate between different game branches

  #### SGF Features
  - 🏷️ **SGF Markers**: LB (Label), TR (Triangle), SQ (Square), CR (Circle),
   MA (Mark)
  - ⚫⚪ **Setup Stones**: AB (Add Black), AW (Add White), AE (Add Empty)
  - ♟️ **Capture Handling**: Automatic removal of captured stones
  - 🔤 **Case-Insensitive**: Supports both `.sgf` and `.SGF` file extensions

  ### 📦 Installation

  **Option 1: Using BRAT**
  1. Install the BRAT plugin
  2. Add this repository: `j2masamitu/obsidian-goboard-viewer`
  3. BRAT will automatically download and install the plugin

  **Option 2: Manual Installation (ZIP)**
  1. Download `obsidian-goboard-viewer-1.0.0.zip`
  2. Extract it in `.obsidian/plugins/` folder
  3. Reload Obsidian and enable the plugin

  **Option 3: Manual Installation (Individual Files)**
  1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`
  2. Create folder `.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-goboard-viewer/`
  3. Copy the files into that folder
  4. Reload Obsidian and enable the plugin

  ### 📱 Mobile Installation Note

  If using a sync plugin like "Remotely Save", temporarily enable "Sync
  Config Dir" to sync the plugin to mobile devices.

  ---

  **Full documentation**: [README.md](https://github.com/j2masamitu/obsidian
  -goboard-viewer/blob/main/README.md) | [日本語版](https://github.com/j2mas
  amitu/obsidian-goboard-viewer/blob/main/README_ja.md)
releases.name: 1.0.0 - Initial Release
